content.bookSubtitle: 7 STEPS TO LAND A JOB YOU LOVE, AT THE SALARY YOU DESERVE, IN THE AI ERA
content.heroTitle: How To Land A Job You Love, At The Salary You Deserve, In The AI Era
content.heroSubtitle: A FREE 7-lesson email course that hands you the modern job-search playbook — even if the old one stopped working for you.
content.createdBy: Created by David Perry & Laurent Simon
content.statsHeadline: This is the exact system we've used to coach 3,000+ professionals across 35 countries to land jobs they love — in 3–8 weeks instead of the ~25-week average.
content.statsCtaSubhead: Drop your email here, and we'll send you the first lesson ASAP:
content.curriculumHeadline: Here's everything we're going to cover (for FREE!) over the next 7 lessons:

curriculum.label: DAY 1
curriculum.title: The Job Hacker Compass
curriculum.desc: Why "open to anything" is quietly killing your search — and the one move that separates a 6-month search from a 6-week one.

curriculum.label: DAY 2
curriculum.title: Proof of Value
curriculum.desc: Nobody hires your duties. They buy the result. How to make hiring managers stop scrolling.

curriculum.label: DAY 3
curriculum.title: The Recruiter Magnet
curriculum.desc: Recruiters search, they don't read. Turn your profile into something they find.

curriculum.label: DAY 4
curriculum.title: The Application Edge
curriculum.desc: More applications won't fix this. Proof will. How to beat the ATS and the reject pile.

curriculum.label: DAY 5
curriculum.title: The Hidden Market
curriculum.desc: The best roles are filled before they're posted. The PIE method opens the door.

curriculum.label: DAY 6
curriculum.title: Interview Mastery
curriculum.desc: An interview isn't a test. The right structure turns it into offers.

curriculum.label: DAY 7
curriculum.title: The Deal Maximiser
curriculum.desc: Most people leave their biggest raise on the table. The most profitable 20 minutes of your year.

content.successBody: Check your inbox — Lesson 1 of The Job Hacker Kickstarter is on its way. (Peek in spam/promotions if you don't see it in a minute.)

B.name: The AI Job Search Repair Kit (v3)

content.bookTitle: THE AI JOB SEARCH REPAIR KIT
content.bookSubtitle: THE 7 MISTAKES QUIETLY KILLING YOUR SEARCH — AND THE FIX FOR EACH
content.heroTitle: Fix The 7 Mistakes Quietly Killing Your Job Search In The AI Era
content.heroSubtitle: A FREE email course that diagnoses one mistake job seekers make in the AI era — then hands you the fix. The old playbook is dead; here's the new one.
content.createdBy: Created by David Perry & Laurent Simon
content.statsHeadline: This is the exact system we've used to coach 3,000+ professionals across 35 countries — taking people from "jobless for 8 months" to hired in ~30 days.
content.statsCtaSubhead: Drop your email here, and we'll send you the first fix ASAP:
content.curriculumHeadline: Here's every mistake we're going to fix (for FREE!) over the next 7 emails:

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #1
curriculum.title: Spraying applications into the void
curriculum.desc: No target, no plan, no replies. Why direction beats effort — and how to point the ship first.

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #2
curriculum.title: Listing duties nobody is buying
curriculum.desc: Nobody hires your responsibilities. They buy the outcome. What hiring managers actually scan for.

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #3
curriculum.title: A LinkedIn that's a resume, not a magnet
curriculum.desc: Recruiters search, they don't read. Become the Recruiter Magnet they find.

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #4
curriculum.title: Applying like everyone else
curriculum.desc: You get screened out before a human reads it. Make the algorithm — and the manager — say yes.

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #5
curriculum.title: Fishing in the crowded 20%
curriculum.desc: Most of the best roles are filled before they're posted. The PIE method opens the side door.

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #6
curriculum.title: Walking in to be judged
curriculum.desc: An interview isn't a test. The right structure turns it into offers.

curriculum.label: MISTAKE #7
curriculum.title: Saying yes too fast
curriculum.desc: Say yes on the spot and you can leave $20k–$60k a year on the table. Run the conversation instead.

content.finalCtaHeadline: Ready to stop making these mistakes?
content.successBody: Check your inbox — the first fix from The AI Job Search Repair Kit is on its way. (Peek in spam/promotions if you don't see it in a minute.)
